prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SDEPS-4PC Product Type: PRECISION_MEASURING Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 4pc Universal Tool Steel Double Ended Surgical a Jewelers Grooved Grips Pick Set Description: The 4pc Steel Double Ended Pick Set is a great addition to any tool collection. Each pick features different shaped ends on both sides as well as grooved grips, allowing for durable and versatile use.

These picks are constructed of 403 steel and are ideal for use by jewelers, mechanics, fishermen, surgeons and more. Make sure to grab a set of these before your next precision project, or gift them to your favorite hobbyist. Search Terms: utility knife bulk home hobby exacto razor blade set locking box cutter safety guard Features: - 4 Piece Set - Double Ended Picks - 403 Steel - Great for Jewelers, Crafters, Hobbyists, Surgeons, Mechanics, Fishermen & More! - Color: Silver === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 4-pc Silver Double Ended Surgical Pick Set

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 4-pk Silver Steel Double Ended Pick Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4 Piece Set, Double Ended Picks, 403 Steel, Grooved Grips, Jewelers Mechanics Surgeons Fishermen

openai.title_differentiation: 4 Piece Set, 403 Steel, Grooved Grips, Double Ended Tips, For Jewelers, Mechanics, Crafters, Fishermen, Surgeons, More
